abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Brotherhood Terminator Squad
■ Paladin Squad

abilities.name: Hammerhand (Psychic)
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [Lethal Hits] ability.

abilities.name: Eye of Judgement (Psychic)
abilities.text: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)

■ Paladin Squad

abilities.name: Exemplar of the Silvered Host
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, on a Critical Wound, the target suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.

abilities.name: Strands of Fate (Psychic)
abilities.text: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Purgation Squad
■ Strike Squad

abilities.name: Clarion of Haste (Psychic)
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Inspiring Exemplar
abilities.text: Each time this model destroys a Character model in the Fight phase, you gain 1CP and, until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its Nemesis force weapon.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Zealous Path
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Paladin Squad

abilities.name: Litanies of Sanctity
abilities.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Grey Knights^^** unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Haloed in Soulfire (Psychic)
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Brotherhood Terminator Squad^^**
- **^^Paladin Squad^^**

abilities.name: Sanctic Hood
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Strike Squad
■ Purgation Squad
■ Purifier Squad

abilities.name: Guardians of the Machine
abilities.text: Each time an enemy unit ends a Charge move within Engagement Range of one or more ^^**Grey Knights Vehicle^^** models from your army and within 6" of this model's unit, you can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Blessing of the Omnissiah
abilities.text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Grey Knights Vehicle**^^ model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that ^^**Vehicle^^** model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Techmarine
abilities.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Grey Knights Vehicle**^^ units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Force Edge (Psychic)
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets a unit (excluding ^^**Vehicles^^** or ^^**Monsters^^**), improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.text: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Champion of the Order of Purifiers (Psychic)
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Purifying Flame weapons equipped by that unit.

abilities.name: Foesight (Psychic)
abilities.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a ^^**Character^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:

■ Purifier Squad

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Might of Titan
abilities.text: Once per battle, at the start of a phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model.

abilities.name: Order of Purifiers
abilities.text: **^^Infantry^^** only. Add the **^^Purifier^^** keyword, and add to the list of units this model can be attached to: **^^Purifiers^^**.

abilities.name: Personal Teleporter
abilities.text: **^^Infantry^^** only. Change this model's Move characteristic to 12", and add the **^^Fly^^** keyword. Replace the list of units this model can be attached to: **^^Interceptor Squad^^**.

abilities.name: Prognosticars' Foresight
abilities.text: This model has the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Terminator Armour
abilities.text: **^^Infantry^^** only. Change this model's Move characteristic to 5", its Toughness and Wounds characteristics to 5, and add the **^^Terminator^^** keyword. Replace the list of units this model can be attached to: **^^Brotherhood Terminator Squad^^**, **^^Paladin Squad^^**.

abilities.name: Sanctuary (Psychic)
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Hammer Aflame (Psychic)
abilities.text: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

■ Paladin Squad

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)

abilities.name: Wisdom of the Ancients (Aura)
abilities.text: While a friendly **^^Grey Knights Infantry^^** unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Fire Support
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-10 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Aerial Assault
abilities.text: Each time a unit with the Deep Strike ability disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Thunderhawk cluster bombs
abilities.text: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Personal Teleporters
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6" as if it were your Movement phase. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Untouchable Purity
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds

abilities.name: One With the Warp (Psychic)
abilities.text: Once per battle, when this model’s unit declares a charge in the same turn it was set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike or Teleport Assault ability, add 3 to the Charge roll.

abilities.name: Supreme Commander
abilities.text: If this model is in your army, it must be your WARLORD.

abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Assault Ramp
abilities.text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Land Raider Banisher
abilities.text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Grey Knights Infantry models. Each Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Indomitable Spirit (Psychic)
abilities.text: This model is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Attuned Onslaught (Psychic)
abilities.text: Each time this unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by ^^**Paladin Squad**^^ models in this unit.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.text: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Righteous Persecution
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** or ^^**Vehicles^^**) hit by one or more of those attacks; until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit's Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Sanctity of Purpose
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Fire Focus
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this ^^**Transport^^** this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Truesilver Aegis (Psychic)
abilities.text: While a friendly ^^**Grey Knights^^** unit is wholly within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability against mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (6+)
abilities.text: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable Save

abilities.name: Mindlock
abilities.text: While a **^^Brotherhood Techmarine^^** model is leading this unit, improve the Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill characteristics of ranged and melee weapons equipped by **^^Servitor^^** models in this unit by 1

abilities.name: Servitor Retinue
abilities.text: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a **^^Brotherhood Techmarine^^** (a unit cannot have more than one **^^Servitors^^** unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

abilities.name: Interceptor
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can ^^**Fly^^**, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Armoured Resilience
abilities.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Strafing Run
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot ^^**Fly^^**, add 1 to the Hit roll

abilities.name: Sanctifying Ritual (Psychic)
abilities.text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker that you control, that objective marker remains under you control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

abilities.name: Guidance of the Ancients
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a **^^Grey Knights^^** model from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.
